# skret

> Cloud-provider secret manager CLI wrapper with Doppler/Infisical-grade developer experience. Secrets live in your own cloud account (AWS SSM Parameter Store today, local YAML for dev/test) under IAM policies you already manage — no SaaS control plane, no new billing line.

## Getting started

- [Getting Started](https://skret.n24q02m.com/guide/getting-started/): Install skret and run the two-command loop (`skret setup` then `skret run -- <command>`); covers `get`/`set`/`list`/`import` basics.
- [Installation](https://skret.n24q02m.com/guide/installation/): Homebrew, Scoop, Go install, and verified binaries.
- [Configuration](https://skret.n24q02m.com/guide/configuration/): The `.skret.yaml` schema — environments, providers, required secrets.

## Scripts and agents

- [Using skret from a script or agent](https://skret.n24q02m.com/guide/agents/): Exit codes (`ExitLeakFound`=10, `ExitDrift`=9, ...), non-interactive flags (`get --plain`, `env --format=json`, `set --from-stdin`), and recipes for `run`/`get`/`env`/`set`/`sync`/`scan`/`import` in CI/cron/AI agents.
- [Value fidelity](https://skret.n24q02m.com/guide/value-fidelity/): How skret preserves secret values byte-for-byte across `get`/`env`/`set`/`template`/`sync`/`import`, and the one exception (`skret run` sanitizes control bytes for the process environment).
- [Error Codes](https://skret.n24q02m.com/reference/error-codes/): Full exit-code table with remediation steps per code.

## Command guides

- [Sync](https://skret.n24q02m.com/guide/sync/): Push secrets to GitHub Actions, Cloudflare Worker/Pages, or a dotenv file; `--skip-unchanged` for drift-aware CI syncs.
- [Scan](https://skret.n24q02m.com/guide/scan/): Leak-guard — find managed secret values committed into tracked files; exits 10 on a match, wire into pre-commit or CI.
- [Diff](https://skret.n24q02m.com/guide/diff/): Compare two secret sets without printing values; `--exit-code` turns it into a CI drift gate.
- [Template](https://skret.n24q02m.com/guide/template/): Render `${KEY}` placeholders in a file from secret values.
- [Hub](https://skret.n24q02m.com/guide/hub/): Publish a names-only secret inventory (no values) to a dashboard.
- [Watch mode](https://skret.n24q02m.com/guide/watch/): Auto-restart `skret run` when a secret changes upstream, with no polling cost.
- [Browse](https://skret.n24q02m.com/guide/browse/): Interactive terminal UI to browse and reveal secrets on demand.

## Providers

- [Provider Comparison](https://skret.n24q02m.com/providers/comparison/): Cost and feature ranking across AWS SSM, OCI Vault, Azure Key Vault, GCP Secret Manager, AWS Secrets Manager.
- [AWS SSM Parameter Store](https://skret.n24q02m.com/providers/aws/): Setup, minimum IAM policy, provider-specific notes.
- [Local YAML Provider](https://skret.n24q02m.com/providers/local/): Dev/test-only provider backed by a plain YAML file.
